movable_parts.name: sm_holdingdevice_a01_dx_01
movable_parts.motion: Rotates outwards on a hinge to open the retractor.

movable_parts.name: sm_holdingdevice_a01_sx_01
movable_parts.motion: Rotates outwards on a hinge to open the retractor.

movable_parts.name: sm_holdingdevice_a01_valvebutton_01
movable_parts.motion: Presses into the valve body, likely to release a lock on the arms.

special_notes: The two hinged arms (dx and sx) are part of a retractor mechanism and likely move symmetrically. The valve button probably functions as a lock/release for the arm positions. For revolute joints, 'range_meters' is used to store the range in radians.
